Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Have more questions? Call or text us directly at 619-755-9207.

Get a Free Quote →
Do you service offices or commercial locations?▾
No — we are a residential-only mobile service. We only come to your home. This allows us to set up properly and deliver the best results possible.
What do you need at my home?▾
⚡💧 This is essential — we require access to a standard outdoor water hookup AND an electrical outlet at every service location. Both must be available before booking. Most homes have these readily accessible.
Do I need to be home during the service?▾
As long as we have access to your vehicle, water, and electricity, you don't need to be present the entire time. We'll notify you when we're done.
How long does a detail take?▾
A Silver Detail typically takes 1.5–2 hours. Gold takes around 3 hours. Diamond and paint enhancement packages may take a full day depending on vehicle size and condition.
What areas do you serve?▾
We serve residential areas across all of San Diego County including La Jolla, Chula Vista, Coronado, El Cajon, Oceanside, Carlsbad, Del Mar, and more. Call to confirm your area.
What payment methods do you accept?▾
We accept all major credit cards, Venmo, Cash App, and cash. Payment is collected after the service is completed to your full satisfaction.

San Diego's trusted residential mobile auto detailing service. We come to your home, 7 days a week.
